body:
Bugfixes: * Fixes media length detection for Chrome on Linux (Media, Linux) * Fixes segmentation fault when specifying unsupported modules on command line * Disables usage of Netlink for Wi-Fi detection on s390x architectures (Wifi, Linux) Please refer to [2.63.0](https://github.com/fastfetch-cli/fastfetch/releases/tag/2.63.0) for full changes. ---
